description: You are a search marketing strategist analyzing online channel performance for a client. Using the data in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\website_analytics.csv, create a channel performance report. Ensure the Revenue, Sessions, and Bounce Rate columns are correctly formatted as numeric values. The report must include a DAX measure named Revenue_Per_Session (Total Revenue divided by Total Sessions) and four visuals: a Line Chart showing Revenue by Month of the year with Year as the legend; a Table showing Source / Medium sorted by Revenue descending; a Card displaying the Revenue_Per_Session measure; and a Slicer for the Year column. Save the finished report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Channel_Performance.pbix. Login: Docker.

metadata.data_challenge: comma-formatted numbers and percentage strings requiring Power Query type conversion
